mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND followee_id = #{followeeId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows f INNER JOIN users u ON f.follower_id = u.id WHERE f.followee_id = #{followeeId} AND u.status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows f INNER JOIN users u ON f.followee_id = u.id WHERE f.follower_id = #{followerId} AND u.status = 1
SELECT f.followee_id FROM follows f INNER JOIN users u ON f.followee_id = u.id WHERE f.follower_id = #{followerId} AND u.status = 1
SELECT f.follower_id FROM follows f INNER JOIN users u ON f.follower_id = u.id WHERE f.followee_id = #{followeeId} AND u.status = 1
